arts.ttl: James Forrest reacts to possibly surpassing Bobby Lennox as Celtic's most decorated player
arts.sum: Bobby Lennox is Celtic’s most decorated player, but with Forrest one trophy behind, there is every chance he should and will surpass the European Cup winner this season. James Forrest plays down surpassing Bobby Lennox as Celtic’s most decorated player

arts.ttl: James Forrest shares what he is 'definitely' going to do once his Celtic career ends
arts.sum: Forrest has been at Celtic for over 21 years and has never left the club in all that time. James Forrest has shared what he plans to do when he eventually hangs up his playing boots for Celtic.

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson comes to the defence of Arne Engels at Celtic amid question marks
arts.sum: With time, certain players have come to the fore and are now thriving in Celtic colours, including January capture Nicolas Kuhn. Engels is no different and that was highlighted by Ferguson, who told Go Radio, that ‘you can see the young guy has quality’.

arts.ttl: Luis Palma Celtic transfer situation addressed as winger linked with move to MLS
arts.sum: Luis Palma has fallen out of favour at Celtic this season, and has been linked with a move to the MLS. Brendan Rodgers has addressed those links, and his future.

arts.ttl: 'Philippe Clement hasn't been able to...' Martin O'Neill reacts to Jim White's Celtic-Rangers question
arts.sum: Given that Rangers are 11 points behind the champions in the table and Philippe Clement is producing sleep-walking football, then there is more pressure on the other side to win something and his job is at risk. Martin O’Neill says it’s ‘unlikely’ Rangers beat Celtic in League Cup final

arts.ttl: What Scott Brown told Celtic winger James Forrest about moving to join him at Ayr United
arts.sum: Forrest played in every season of Celtic’s nine-in-a-row run so with that in mind, here are five of his most important league title wins. James Forrest is one of only a handful of players who can say they spent their whole footballing career at Celtic in the history of the club.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dinamo Zagreb recent form – Croatians without a win in over a month
arts.sum: Here is Celtic and Dinamo Zagreb's recent form across all competition's side-by-side

arts.ttl: Rumoured EPL Celtic transfer target wouldn't get into starting XI, says Lennon
arts.sum: Former Celtic player and manager Neil Lennon reckons a recently rumoured transfer target from the English Premier League would struggle for game time in Glasgow

arts.ttl: Simon Donnelly tells Luke McCowan how to cement Celtic starting slot
arts.sum: Celtic star Luke McCowan is the talk of the support at the moment after his excellent display against Ross County last weekend. Speaking on Clyde 1 Superscoreboard, Donnelly believes McCowan simply needs to keep performing when called upon, which will eventually lead to him displacing someone in the Celtic midfield.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' honest verdict on Scottish Premiership title race as Celtic travel to face Aberdeen
arts.sum: Currently, the Bhoys preside over a four-point gap and have played a game less than the Dons heading into a night expected to be filled with drama at Pittodrie. Speaking yesterday to the press ahead of Celtic’s trip to Aberdeen, Rodgers admitted that there is still a long way to go before drawing definitive conclusions on how the title race could sit this season.
